name: Okra Rotel
recipeIngredient: 10 oz ROTEL Tomato with Green Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the ROTEL tomatoes and green chilies using a potato masher and set aside.
2. Fry the bacon until crisp, then remove and add it to the drippings.
3. Add the sliced okra, onion, vinegar, bell pepper strips, and celery stalks.
4. Cook until the ingredients are tender.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (sugar, salt, pepper, and chili powder).
6. Simmer, stirring often; you may need to add water during simmering.
7. Leftovers can be frozen.
